fields.formulaExpression:
format_number(case when Diff_new_callplan_rev__c < 0 then
Diff_new_callplan_rev__c * -1
else
Diff_new_callplan_rev__c
end, '### ### ###')

fields.name: Delta_New_Portfolio

fields.formulaExpression:
case when (("FILTER7.Migration_recommendation__c" is not null)  and ("FILTER7.Migration_recommendation__c" != ''))  then
	case when "FILTER7.Migration_recommendation__c" = 'Bedrift Frihet Premium' then
		'Migrer abonnementet til ' || "FILTER7.Migration_recommendation__c" || '. Gjennomsnittlig dataforbruk siste 3 måneder er ' || format_number("FILTER7.Average_data_use_3_months", '# ### ###.##') || 'GB.'
	else
		'Migrer abonnementet til ' || "FILTER7.Migration_recommendation__c" || ' eller høyere. Gjennomsnittlig dataforbruk siste 3 måneder er ' || format_number("FILTER7.Average_data_use_3_months", '# ### ###.##') || 'GB.'
	end
end
